title: ATF
wikitext:
[]: ATF             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 18, 2007 4:17 am the AT Field stands for Absolute Terror Field. why?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Oct 18, 2007 6:20 am Absolute Terror Field- Absolute-absolute. The ending-the most you can get by. It blocks out all direct physical strikes. REMEMBER: The Absolute-the uppermost you can get to-after that, it's absolute. Terror, blocks out all physical strikes. Fields, a field. The word explains itself. Am I being too arrogant?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Oct 18, 2007 7:39 am Without it there would be absolute terror since we would have to be one with everyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 11:43 am It's apparently some sort of psychology term or something...

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Oct 18, 2007 12:02 pm No it isn't.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Oct 18, 2007 12:27 pm My two fanwanky cents on what the terror part stands for.... The ATF prevents the subject (angel or eva) from being hurt. The human version keeps humans apart from each other as separate individuals. Humans (according to Sarte) are essentially alone in the universe unable to make complete contact with each other, and as evidenced by Shinji Ikari are afraid (or terrorized) of contact with each other. The AT Field therefore protects humans from making contact with each other as (in the form of one big entity or the Sea of LCL) and preventing the pain that comes with relationships with other humans. And that's my fanwanky idea of why it's called the Anti-Terror Field, it prevents the terror of both the physical pain and the pain that results from contact with other humans.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Thu Oct 18, 2007 12:33 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: It's apparently some sort of psychology term or something...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 5:42 pm Szmitten wrote: No it isn't.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Oct 18, 2007 7:53 pm AT Field, or Absolute Terror Field is nothing more than Engrish terminology. It sounds cool and foreign, so they used it, regardless of whether or not it makes any sense.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Oct 18, 2007 7:59 pm Kaworu's rather cryptic exposition during the descent to Terminal Dogma makes out the AT Field to be some sort of intrinsic barrier, whose primary purpose is to keep individuals, as individuals, i.e. separate from others, seemingly in a mental or spiritual sense, or perhaps just a physical one. This is supported by the fact that during Third Impact, it is seemingly the destruction of the AT Fields that allows all life to be "merged" into Lilith. Indeed, Aoba explicitly mentions that Lilith's Anti-AT Fields will cause individuals to be unable to maintain their individual forms, and the loss of it cause them to rather spectacularly tang. The Angels and Evas appear to be able to uses their AT Fields in a much more physical way, as physical barriers, but also seemingly to augment their abilities and strength. Whether LDOs or indeed Lilith herself can do this is a matter capable of question, though Rei does create an ATF barrier in episode #24'.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 8:06 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Whether LDOs or indeed Lilith herself can do this is a matter capable of question, though Rei does create an ATF barrier in episode #24'.
